class.name: XMLFilterImpl
class.signature: public class XMLFilterImpl extends Object implements XMLFilter, EntityResolver, DTDHandler, ContentHandler, ErrorHandler
class.description: Base class for deriving an XML filter. This class is designed to sit between an XMLReader and the client application's event handlers. By default, it does nothing but pass requests up to the reader and events on to the handlers unmodified, but subclasses can override specific methods to modify the event stream or the configuration requests as they pass through.

constructors.name: XMLFilterImpl
constructors.description: Construct an empty XML filter, with no parent. This filter will have no parent: you must assign a parent before you start a parse or do any configuration with setFeature or setProperty, unless you use this as a pure event consumer rather than as an XMLReader.

constructors.name: XMLFilterImpl
constructors.description: Construct an XML filter with the specified parent.

methods.name: setParent
methods.signature: public void setParent(XMLReader parent)
methods.description: Set the parent reader. This is the XMLReader from which this filter will obtain its events and to which it will pass its configuration requests. The parent may itself be another filter. If there is no parent reader set, any attempt to parse or to set or get a feature or property will fail.

methods.name: getParent
methods.signature: public XMLReader getParent()
methods.returns: The parent XML reader, or null if none is set.

methods.name: setFeature
methods.signature: public void setFeature(String name, boolean value) throws SAXNotRecognizedException, SAXNotSupportedException
methods.description: Set the value of a feature. This will always fail if the parent is null.

throws.description: If the feature value can't be assigned or retrieved from the parent.
When the parent recognizes the feature name but cannot set the requested value.

methods.name: getFeature
methods.signature: public boolean getFeature(String name) throws SAXNotRecognizedException, SAXNotSupportedException
methods.description: Look up the value of a feature. This will always fail if the parent is null.

throws.description: If the feature value can't be assigned or retrieved from the parent.
When the parent recognizes the feature name but cannot determine its value at this time.

methods.returns: The current value of the feature.

methods.name: setProperty
methods.signature: public void setProperty(String name, Object value) throws SAXNotRecognizedException, SAXNotSupportedException
methods.description: Set the value of a property. This will always fail if the parent is null.

throws.description: If the property value can't be assigned or retrieved from the parent.
When the parent recognizes the property name but cannot set the requested value.

methods.name: getProperty
methods.signature: public Object getProperty(String name) throws SAXNotRecognizedException, SAXNotSupportedException
methods.description: Look up the value of a property.

throws.description: If the property value can't be assigned or retrieved from the parent.
When the parent recognizes the property name but cannot determine its value at this time.

methods.returns: The current value of the property.

methods.name: setEntityResolver
methods.signature: public void setEntityResolver(EntityResolver resolver)

methods.name: getEntityResolver
methods.signature: public EntityResolver getEntityResolver()
methods.returns: The current entity resolver, or null if none was set.

methods.name: setDTDHandler
methods.signature: public void setDTDHandler(DTDHandler handler)

methods.name: getDTDHandler
methods.signature: public DTDHandler getDTDHandler()
methods.description: Get the current DTD event handler.
methods.returns: The current DTD handler, or null if none was set.

methods.name: setContentHandler
methods.signature: public void setContentHandler(ContentHandler handler)

methods.name: getContentHandler
methods.signature: public ContentHandler getContentHandler()
methods.returns: The current content handler, or null if none was set.

methods.name: setErrorHandler
methods.signature: public void setErrorHandler(ErrorHandler handler)

methods.name: getErrorHandler
methods.signature: public ErrorHandler getErrorHandler()
methods.description: Get the current error event handler.
methods.returns: The current error handler, or null if none was set.

methods.name: parse
methods.signature: public void parse(InputSource input) throws SAXException, IOException

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: The input source for the document entity.

throws.description: Any SAX exception, possibly wrapping another exception.
An IO exception from the parser, possibly from a byte stream or character stream supplied by the application.

methods.signature: public void parse(String systemId) throws SAXException, IOException

parameters.name: systemId
parameters.description: The system identifier as a fully-qualified URI.

throws.description: Any SAX exception, possibly wrapping another exception.
An IO exception from the parser, possibly from a byte stream or character stream supplied by the application.

methods.name: resolveEntity
methods.signature: public InputSource resolveEntity(String publicId, String systemId) throws SAXException, IOException

parameters.name: publicId
parameters.description: The entity's public identifier, or null.

throws.description: The client may throw an exception during processing.
The client may throw an I/O-related exception while obtaining the new InputSource.

methods.returns: A new InputSource or null for the default.
